headline: Has Constellation Brands (STZ) Fallen Too Far After Five Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Constellation Brands is attractively priced today, it helps to separate the share price story from the underlying value story. The stock last closed at US$149.62, with returns of 6.0% year to date but a 13.5% decline over the past year and a 30.8% decline over five years. This combination may change how you think about both risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on how Constellation Brands fits within the broader beverage sector and how investors are...
